  # Group triples by subject
      from collections import defaultdict
      groups = defaultdict(list)
      for t in triples:
          groups[t.subject].append(t)
  
      sentences = []
      for subj, items in groups.items():
          parts = [phrase(subj, t.predicate, t.object) for t in items]
          # Join parts with commas and a final conjunction
          if len(parts) == 1:
              sent = parts[0]
          else:
              sent = ", ".join(parts[:-1]) + ", and " + parts[-1]
          sentences.append(sent)
  
      # Combine subject sentences
      return " Also, ".join(sentences) + "."
with:
  # Build special handling for mission‑crew relationships
      from collections import defaultdict
      mission_to_crew = defaultdict(list)          # mission -> list of crew members
      astronaut_to_mission = {}                    # astronaut -> mission
      used_triples = set()                         # triples consumed in combined sentences
  
      for t in triples:
          pred_key = t.predicate.lower().replace(" ", "")
          if pred_key == "crewmembers":
              mission_to_crew[t.subject].append(t.object)
              used_triples.add((t.subject, t.predicate, t.object))
          elif pred_key == "mission":
              astronaut_to_mission[t.subject] = t.object
              used_triples.add((t.subject, t.predicate, t.object))
  
      # Create combined sentences for each mission that has crew information
      combined_sentences = []
      for mission, crew_list in mission_to_crew.items():
          # add astronauts linked to this mission
          for astronaut, m in astronaut_to_mission.items():
              if m == mission:
                  crew_list.append(astronaut)
          if crew_list:
              # preserve order while removing duplicates
              unique_names = list(dict.fromkeys(crew_list))
              if len(unique_names) == 1:
                  sent = f"{unique_names[0]} was a crew member of {mission}"
              else:
                  names_str = ", ".join(unique_names[:-1]) + " and " + unique_names[-1]
                  sent = f"Both {names_str} were crew members aboard {mission}"
